secrets: They possess a compass pointing toward their greatest fear.
They possess a pocket watch that ticks backwards.
They possess a sealed letter they swore never to open.
They possess a journal written in an unknown language.
They possess a coin that always returns when discarded.
They possess a key for a lock they have never seen.
They possess whispers that nobody else notices.
They possess a glowing stone wrapped in cloth.
They possess an old photograph containing an unidentifiable figure.
They possess they are watched by an unseen companion.
